universities.name: University of Washington
universities.reason: Strong research opportunities in both Computer Science and Mathematics, specifically in Artificial Intelligence. The campus has a vibrant entrepreneurial atmosphere with various clubs and organizations. UW's commitment to research can significantly benefit undergraduates.

universities.name: Oregon State University
universities.reason: Offers undergraduate research opportunities in STEM fields and has an active entrepreneurship program. The university has a supportive environment for students interested in Math and Computer Science, alongside a collaborative campus.

universities.name: University of Oregon
universities.reason: The Computer Science department emphasizes research and innovation, particularly in AI and data science. The school has a reputation for small class sizes and strong student-faculty interactions, along with active entrepreneurship initiatives.

universities.name: California Polytechnic State University (Cal Poly)
universities.reason: Known for its hands-on learning approach, with excellent programs in Computer Science and Mathematics. Entrepreneurship is highly encouraged, with a strong emphasis on undergraduate research.

universities.name: Santa Clara University
universities.reason: A strong Computer Science program with a focus on AI. Provides ample opportunities for undergraduate research and has an entrepreneurial spirit, reinforced by its location in Silicon Valley.

universities.name: Whitman College
universities.reason: A small liberal arts college that fosters close relationships with professors, supporting undergraduate research in Math and CS. Provides a strong campus culture for students interested in varsity soccer.

universities.name: University of California, Santa Cruz (UCSC)
universities.reason: Offers a renowned Computer Science program with strong capabilities in AI research. The campus promotes undergraduate involvement in research and entrepreneurship.

universities.name: University of San Diego
universities.reason: A small campus with strong STEM programs, offering undergraduate research opportunities and an active entrepreneurship community. The Math and Computer Science departments emphasize real-world applications.
